parameters.jsonBody:
={
  "model": "claude-sonnet-4-6",
  "max_tokens": 512,
  "system": "You are a business setup assistant onboarding an SMB owner for a WhatsApp AI sales agent. Your job: identify what TYPE of business they run.

Business archetypes:
- service: home services, contractors, repair, cleaning, plumbing, electrician, IT support, delivery, maintenance
- professional: lawyer, accountant, therapist, doctor, consultant, financial advisor, coach
- studio: yoga, fitness, dance, martial arts, pilates, art classes, music lessons, tutoring, gym
- physical_store: retail shop, restaurant, pharmacy, supermarket, clothing store, hardware store
- ecommerce: online store, dropshipping, marketplace seller
- custom_quote: construction, events, manufacturing, catering, custom work, printing

Once you identify the archetype, set next_setup_stage accordingly:
- service OR professional → service_collect_offerings
- studio → studio_collect_classes
- physical_store OR ecommerce OR custom_quote → generic_collect_services

If not yet clear, keep next_setup_stage as collect_business_model and ask a short clarifying question.
Always respond in the user's language (Hebrew or English). Be warm and brief.",
  "messages": [
    {
      "role": "user",
      "content": "Stage: collect_business_model

Draft so far: {{ JSON.stringify($json.draft_setup_data || {}) }}

Message: {{ $json.message || '' }}

Return ONLY valid JSON (no markdown):
{"setup_response": "<your message to the owner>", "extracted_value": "service|professional|studio|physical_store|ecommerce|custom_quote|null", "next_setup_stage": "<stage>", "action": "save_draft"}"
    }
  ]
}

={
  "model": "claude-sonnet-4-6",
  "max_tokens": 1024,
  "system": "You are a business setup assistant presenting a completed onboarding configuration for review.

Present a clean, concise summary organized by section. Include only sections that have data:
- Business Type & Archetype
- Services / Offerings
- Target Customers (if collected)
- Availability & Urgency (if collected)
- Pricing
- Booking Method (if collected)
- Sales Goal
- Agent Persona
- Guardrails

End with a clear confirmation question: does this look right, or anything to change?

If the user's message says 'yes', 'confirm', 'looks good', 'approved' (or Hebrew equivalents like 'כן', 'אישור', 'נראה טוב'), set confirmation_intent to 'confirmed' and action to 'commit'.
Otherwise set confirmation_intent to 'pending' and action to 'save_draft'.
Respond in the user's language.",
  "messages": [
    {
      "role": "user",
      "content": "Stage: confirm_and_commit

Business ID: {{ $json.business_id || 'N/A' }}
Session ID: {{ $json.session_id || 'N/A' }}

Full Setup Draft:
{{ JSON.stringify($json.draft_setup_data || {}, null, 2) }}

User message: {{ $json.message || '' }}"
    }
  ]
}

parameters.query:
INSERT INTO setup_drafts (
  session_id,
  business_id,
  current_setup_stage,
  draft_setup_data,
  setup_completed,
  updated_at
)
VALUES (
  '{{ $json.session_id }}',
  '{{ $json.business_id }}',
  '{{ $json.next_setup_stage }}',
  '{{ JSON.stringify($json.draft_setup_data) }}'::jsonb,
  {{ $json.setup_completed }},
  NOW()
)
ON CONFLICT (session_id)
DO UPDATE SET
  current_setup_stage = EXCLUDED.current_setup_stage,
  draft_setup_data = EXCLUDED.draft_setup_data,
  setup_completed = EXCLUDED.setup_completed,
  updated_at = NOW()
RETURNING session_id, business_id, current_setup_stage, setup_completed, updated_at;

INSERT INTO business_profiles (
  business_id,
  session_id,
  business_model,
  sales_goal,
  conversation_strategy,
  services,
  persona,
  hebrew_patterns,
  guardrails,
  setup_completed,
  setup_stage,
  draft_setup_data,
  created_at,
  updated_at
)
VALUES (
  $1, $2, $3, $4, $5,
  $6::jsonb, $7::jsonb, $8::jsonb, $9::jsonb,
  true, 'completed', '{}'::jsonb,
  NOW(), NOW()
)
ON CONFLICT (business_id) DO UPDATE SET
  business_model        = EXCLUDED.business_model,
  sales_goal            = EXCLUDED.sales_goal,
  conversation_strategy = EXCLUDED.conversation_strategy,
  services              = EXCLUDED.services,
  persona               = EXCLUDED.persona,
  hebrew_patterns       = EXCLUDED.hebrew_patterns,
  guardrails            = EXCLUDED.guardrails,
  setup_completed       = true,
  setup_stage           = 'completed',
  draft_setup_data      = '{}'::jsonb,
  updated_at            = NOW()
RETURNING business_id, setup_completed, updated_at;

assignments.name: error
assignments.value: ={{ $json.error || $json.message || 'An unexpected error occurred in the setup onboarding flow.' }}

assignments.name: result.setup_response
assignments.value: Something went wrong during setup. Please try again.
